languages.text: "Почтенное техножречество могло бы предложить свою помощь и без условий". {n}В ворчании Абеляра слышится искренняя уязвленность.{/n}
"The esteemed Tech-Priests could offer their assistance without any terms." {n}You detect the wounded tone beneath Abelard's grumbling.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Почтенное техножречество могло бы предложить свою помощь и без условий". {n}В ворчании Абеляра слышится искренняя уязвленность.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "The esteemed Tech-Priests could offer their assistance without any terms." {n}You detect the wounded tone beneath Abelard's grumbling.{/n}
"The esteemed Tech-Priests could offer their assistance without any terms." {n}You detect the wounded tone beneath Abelard's grumbling.{/n}
"The esteemed Tech-Priests could offer their assistance without any terms." {n}You detect the wounded tone beneath Abelard's grumbling.{/n}

languages.text: 「尊敬されるテクプリストが条件なしで援助してくれるなんて」{n}アベラールがため息をつく声に、傷ついた様子が感じられる。{/n}
languages.original_text: "The esteemed Tech-Priests could offer their assistance without any terms." {n}You detect the wounded tone beneath Abelard's grumbling.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「尊敬されるテクプリストが条件なしで援助してくれるなんて」{n}アベラールがため息をつく声に、傷ついた様子が感じられる。{/n}

languages.text: «Los estimados tecnosacerdotes también podrían ofrecer su ayuda sin condiciones». {n}El tono herido de Abelard al mascullar no pasa desapercibido.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The esteemed Tech-Priests could offer their assistance without any terms." {n}You detect the wounded tone beneath Abelard's grumbling.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Los estimados tecnosacerdotes también podrían ofrecer su ayuda sin condiciones». {n}El tono herido de Abelard al mascullar no pasa desapercibido.{/n}

languages.text: "Die geschätzten Techpriester könnten ihre bedingungslose Unterstützung anbieten." {n}Du erkennst den verletzten Unterton hinter Abelards Gemurre.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The esteemed Tech-Priests could offer their assistance without any terms." {n}You detect the wounded tone beneath Abelard's grumbling.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Die geschätzten Techpriester könnten ihre bedingungslose Unterstützung anbieten." {n}Du erkennst den verletzten Unterton hinter Abelards Gemurre.{/n}

languages.text: « Les illustres technoprêtres pourraient offrir leur soutien sans poser de conditions. » {n}Dissimulée sous les grognements d'Abélard, vous percevez une trace de tristesse.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The esteemed Tech-Priests could offer their assistance without any terms." {n}You detect the wounded tone beneath Abelard's grumbling.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Les illustres technoprêtres pourraient offrir leur soutien sans poser de conditions. » {n}Dissimulée sous les grognements d'Abélard, vous percevez une trace de tristesse.{/n}

languages.text: “尊贵的技术神甫们本可以无条件提供协助。”{n}你从阿贝拉德的低声抱怨中听出了一丝挫败与不甘。{/n}
languages.original_text: "The esteemed Tech-Priests could offer their assistance without any terms." {n}You detect the wounded tone beneath Abelard's grumbling.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “尊贵的技术神甫们本可以无条件提供协助。”{n}你从阿贝拉德的低声抱怨中听出了一丝挫败与不甘。{/n}

languages.text: "Saygıdeğer Tekno Rahipler, yardımlarını hiçbir şart koşmadan da sunabilirdi." {n}Abelard'ın homurtusunun altındaki kırgın tonu fark ediyorsun.{/n}
